1.note: Bootstrapped from an already-completed 8-parallel-pass audit; no new repository exploration performed.

2.note: Reviewed homepage/header/footer/nav, full CTA inventory across all 33 public pages, and content-accuracy spot-checks. Confirmed header/footer byte-identical across sample pages, no broken internal links, sitemap.html accurate, no staffing/credential exaggeration found. Added F037 (new); expanded F017 with full evidence table; re-confirmed F008/F009/F010/F018/F024/F029 still accurate.

findingIdRange.note: IDs are derived from real findings only; there is no predetermined catalog size such as F001-F060.
